base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of big_mario_skid — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Turning/skid pose at Big form scale. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Turning/skid pose at Big form scale
